starter.audience: Evaluation and account setup before you subscribe
starter.valueUnlock: Open-source and local runs stay free; subscribe for licensed npm, API keys, and monthly paid verification quota.

individual.audience: Running CI as a single engineer
individual.valueUnlock: Run verification in CI with API access and included monthly usage.

team.valueUnlock: Run verification across shared CI pipelines without hitting limits.

business.valueUnlock: Same enforcement with more headroom across services and busy pipelines.

enterprise.audience: Procurement, SLAs, on-prem, or locked-down environments.
enterprise.valueUnlock: Sales-led onboarding with contract terms and limits tailored to you.
